meta_title: For Freelancers: passive income to Solve can't finish projects (Beginner Checklist)
meta_description: Learn how to passive income and overcome can't finish projects. A Beginner-level Checklist using Antigravity and Claude Code.

content.seo_title: For Freelancers: Passive Income to Solve Project Stall
content.seo_description: Overcome project paralysis with this expert-led guide. Learn how to generate passive income through AI-built micro-SaaS using Antigravity and Claude Code.
content.answer_block: The root cause of project abandonment is scope creep and lack of recurring value. By shifting your freelance focus toward AI-driven micro-SaaS, you replace one-off client work with automated, passive income streams. Use Antigravity for rapid scaffolding and Claude Code for iterative development to ship functional products in under 48 hours.
content.intro:
You’re staring at a graveyard of half-finished repositories, the digital ghosts of projects that promised freedom but delivered only burnout. The freelance treadmill demands your constant presence, trading hours for dollars until the well runs dry. The friction isn't your talent—it's the architecture of how you build.

True liberation comes from shifting your workflow from manual labor to automated assets. By leveraging AI-first development stacks, you stop building websites and start architecting passive income engines. It’s time to stop chasing the next contract and start building systems that earn while you sleep.

steps.title: Define the Micro-SaaS Value Proposition
steps.description: Identify a singular, painful problem for a niche audience. Focus on one feature that solves a specific data-processing or automation need.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Act as a SaaS Architect. Analyze the niche 'freelance project management' and suggest 3 micro-SaaS ideas that solve one specific pain point, require no database complexity, and can be monetized via Stripe.

steps.title: Generate the MVP Architecture
steps.description: Use Antigravity to define your schema and route structure, ensuring you don't over-engineer the database layer.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate a lean Prisma schema for a subscription-based tool that tracks user usage limits. Include only essential fields for User, Subscription, and UsageLog.

steps.title: Build the Core Logic with Claude Code
steps.description: Focus on the primary business logic. If the core feature doesn't work in 2 hours, pivot the feature, not the code.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Write the business logic for a Next.js API route that validates a subscription status against Stripe and executes the core tool function. Use clean, error-handled TypeScript.
steps.claude_code_command: claude edit src/app/api/process/route.ts --prompt "Implement the core subscription validation logic"

steps.title: Integrate Automated Payment Rails
steps.description: Eliminate manual billing. Integrate Stripe Checkout to ensure the 'passive' part of your income stream is functional from day one.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Provide a boilerplate implementation for a Stripe webhook handler in Next.js that updates the database subscription field when a user pays.
steps.claude_code_command: claude edit src/app/api/webhook/route.ts --prompt "Setup Stripe webhook to listen for checkout.session.completed"

steps.title: Deploy and Automate Monitoring
steps.description: Ship to Vercel and set up automated error tracking. Your project is finished only when it is live and reachable by users.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create a deployment checklist for a Vercel-hosted Next.js app, including environment variable configuration and essential monitoring setup.

pro_tips: Never build an auth system from scratch; use Clerk or NextAuth to save 20 hours of boilerplate.
Prioritize 'Time-to-First-Dollar' over feature parity with competitors.
Use Claude Code to write unit tests for your payment logic, not your UI components.
If a feature takes more than one prompt-response cycle to architect, it's too complex for an MVP.
Automate your social proof by integrating a simple testimonial collector into your post-payment success page.
content.next_steps: Once your MVP is live, spend 80% of your time on distribution and 20% on incremental feature updates based on actual user feedback.
content.conversion_block: Stop letting your ideas die in a folder. Build, ship, and monetize with the same tools top-tier engineers use to dominate the market. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
